title: Firmware for esp32 WROOM 32D with SX1276

messages.author: Selucre
messages.text: Hi, Im trying to jerry-rig a room/repeater with an esp and a lora board, roughly following this guide https://www.makerguides.com/long-range-communication-with-lora-sx1276-and-esp32/#Dupont_Wire_Set I've seen a couple mentions of firmware people have made for this setup, but cant find links to it. If anyone has appropriate firmware, would they please share it? Otherwise I'll share my own as I muddle my way through it. (edited)
messages.content_html: Hi, Im trying to jerry-rig a room/repeater with an esp and a lora board, roughly following this guide https://www.makerguides.com/long-range-communication-with-lora-sx1276-and-esp32/#Dupont_Wire_Set I've seen a couple mentions of firmware people have made for this setup, but cant find links to it. If anyone has appropriate firmware, would they please share it? Otherwise I'll share my own as I muddle my way through it. (edited)

messages.author: arti
messages.text: I did something similar few weeks ago using a ESP32 LilyGo T-Display
messages.content_html: I did something similar few weeks ago using a ESP32 LilyGo T-Display

messages.author: Audionaut
messages.text: @Selucre Did you get it to work? I have something similar in mind. My Setup is a esp32-s3 devkitc c1 and a RAK3172 module. So FW vise it should be very similar. I'm using ESP-IDF though (edited)
messages.content_html: @Selucre Did you get it to work? I have something similar in mind. My Setup is a esp32-s3 devkitc c1 and a RAK3172 module. So FW vise it should be very similar. I'm using ESP-IDF though (edited)

messages.author: Alfons Koenig
messages.text: Very interessting, because I would like to modify the firmware, to use a ESP32S3 with an SX1276
